content: Hello, i just started and was wondering on who should i get on the beginners banner (i think)
What does realm conflict mean?
Thais/Horla/Murphy/Ham
can only run two different realms on a team
so a third realm counts as realm conflict
Ohhh
I assumed you could run all 4
Thank you

Hello, most units work.

Blue
Caecus
Goliath
Sanga

Purple
Jenkins

Yellow
Nautila (maybe)

Red 
Helot
Faint (defensive)
Others work too, these mostly help you to deal damage early
